testcase.name: test_admin_login_returns_access_token

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'admin' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe15c8e25fc0>('role') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe15c8e25fc0> = {}.get + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe15c8e272c0>('user', {}) + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe15c8e272c0> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjYmI2MjNhNS0xYjk2LTQyZTMtOWNjMS00ZDg0ZDhiNzAwNDEiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImFkbWluQHJpc3RydXR0dXJhLmFwcCIsImV4cCI6MTc3NzA3MTYyMywidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyJ9.bOpKV8_X4STV1nY1EQcYcfcGeq5YFBi3GIgeBgCMJFM', 'email': 'admin@ristruttura.app', 'id': 'cbb623a5-1b96-42e3-9cc1-4d84d8b70041', 'name': 'Admin', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_biz.py:55: in test_admin_login_returns_access_token assert d.get("user", {}).get("role") == "admin" E AssertionError: assert None == 'admin' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe15c8e25fc0>('role') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe15c8e25fc0> = {}.get E + where {} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe15c8e272c0>('user', {}) E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe15c8e272c0> = {'access_token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjYmI2MjNhNS0xYjk2LTQyZTMtOWNjMS00ZDg0ZDhiNzAwNDEiLCJlbWFpbCI6ImFkbWluQHJpc3RydXR0dXJhLmFwcCIsImV4cCI6MTc3NzA3MTYyMywidHlwZSI6ImFjY2VzcyJ9.bOpKV8_X4STV1nY1EQcYcfcGeq5YFBi3GIgeBgCMJFM', 'email': 'admin@ristruttura.app', 'id': 'cbb623a5-1b96-42e3-9cc1-4d84d8b70041', 'name': 'Admin', ...}.get
